message:
feat(tests): add 45-test proptest suite for connector_host_runtime (ft-3681t.5.1)

Property-based and edge-case coverage for the connector host runtime
state machine: transition invariants, budget enforcement, serde roundtrips,
operation envelope monotonicity, heartbeat liveness, history bounding,
config validation, protocol upgrade, mark_failure, and Display impls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
